summary: Iteration 213: Phase E v2.4.0 Cold-Start Peer Matching - All tests passed. Backend: 39/39 pytest tests (9 unit + 11 API + 19 existing). Frontend: Version 2.4.0 confirmed, IntakeLearningPanel peer-matches section verified with promote buttons. DATA HYGIENE: Giovanni (C-10250) state intact - 6 patterns, 16 lines, 0 events, 0 retired.
critical_code_review_comments: TF-IDF matcher is pure Python (no sklearn) - intentional design choice for transparency and cost
Fingerprint invalidation correctly wired into feedback service after pattern mutations
promote_inherited_suggestion correctly handles: success, already_present, source not found (404)
IntakeLearningPanel correctly renders peer-matches section with purple styling, matched tokens, and ArrowUpRight promote buttons
seed_data_creation: Created temporary test document with peer_matches for UI verification, then deleted
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase E v2.4.0 cold-start peer matching fully tested. Giovanni (C-10250) has 6 patterns with 16 associated lines, 0 events, 0 retired lines - this is the baseline state. New test file test_cold_start_api.py covers all 3 new endpoints. IntakeLearningPanel peer-matches section renders correctly with: purple border/background, similarity %, matched token pills, inherited suggestions with ArrowUpRight promote buttons (data-testid='peer-promote-{i}-{j}'). DATA HYGIENE CRITICAL: Always use C-TEST-FAKE-* prefix for test customers and clean up after tests.
